item21_financial_structure_detail.entity_purpose: Single-purpose franchise holding and royalty collection vehicle

item21_statement_detail.revenue_recognition: IP license — series of distinct services over time; variable consideration (royalty fees) allocated to distinct services; fixed consideration (sales/COO fees) allocated based on standalone selling prices and recognized over contract term
item21_statement_detail.franchise_contracts_accounting: Contract acquisition costs capitalized and amortized straight-line over contract term (10-20 years); amortization reduces royalty fee revenue. Graduate brand intangibles acquired at ~$85M with 15-year useful life.
item21_statement_detail.franchise_deposits: Collected at application; reclassified to deferred revenues when non-refundable; recognized over contract term
item21_statement_detail.credit_losses: Based on historical collection activity, instrument nature, and business conditions. Allowance: $10.4M (AR) + $3.8M (financing receivables) at Dec 31, 2024
item21_statement_detail.income_taxes: Disregarded entity for US tax purposes; all items flow to Hilton Worldwide consolidated return. Foreign tax expense relates to territorial franchise fee withholding.
item21_statement_detail.subsequent_events: Evaluated through March 18, 2024 (likely typo for 2025). No material subsequent events disclosed.
item21_statement_detail.commitments_contingencies: Guarantees certain Hilton debt (2025-2033); all assets pledged. Routine litigation expected not material.

damages: Liquidated Damages (System/Hotel Avg Monthly Royalty × up to 60)

unresolveds.description: Restricted Area negotiability — no standard formula, minimum area, or typical scope disclosed
Management fee for affiliate management — 'will be established by mutual agreement' with no range disclosed
PIP requirements for conversions — determined project-by-project, no standard template
Insurance requirements — per confidential Manual, not disclosed in FDD
Restaurant Brand concept specifics — deferred to Exhibit J-2
Note 9 subsequent events date discrepancy — states 'March 18, 2024' for FY2024 financials, likely should be 2025

contradictions.description: Special risks states no federal registration for 'Canopy' principal mark, but Item 13 lists Registration 7552571 dated Oct 29, 2024
Note 9 subsequent events evaluation date 'March 18, 2024' appears to be typographical error for 'March 18, 2025'
